scope: Every .py/.sh/.js/.mjs/.cjs/.html candidate below tests/, excluding non-executable tests/fixtures migration evidence.
policy: Every active candidate is either reached by the canonical offline runner, a documented non-recursive entrypoint/support file, or explicitly external, credentialed, destructive, or network-dependent.
